chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D- 2815 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections 2. For katcha Peshi 25.01.2018. None is present for petitioner Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto Asstt:A.G -=-=- This petition is called for hearing, neither petitioner nor his counsel are present. No intimation is received. Same was the position on last two dates of hearings viz. 05.10.2017 and 13.11.2017. It is stated by Learned Asstt:A.G that alleged detenue namely Abdul Sattar s/o Abdul Ghaffar is involved in crime No.256/2017 of police station Kotri, therefore, according to him alleged detenue is no more missing person. Under the circumstances, this petition stands dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE A.Rasheed
